headlines.title: John Cornyn’s last stand and Democratic fights: What to watch in Texas elections
headlines.description: Tuesday’s primary runoffs in Texas will put President Donald Trump’s endorsement to the test again — the latest step in a mission to punish some incumbent Republicans he has deemed insufficiently loyal

headlines.title: South Carolina’s redistricting effort fails in the state Senate with GOP opposition
headlines.description: The Republican-led South Carolina Senate voted against advancing a new congressional map, ending the redistricting effort in the state for now.

headlines.title: Vance opens up about his faith journey — and on Usha’s central role
headlines.description: Vance spoke to NBC News in an interview that touched on Iran, Secretary of State Marco Rubio and the “anti-weaponization fund.”

headlines.title: Deal or no deal? Trump’s social media posts add confusion to Iran conflict
headlines.description: President Donald Trump’s social posts left a trail of confusion this weekend as Iran negotiations continue.

headlines.title: First images of UFC fight night venue at White House
headlines.description: Construction crews are building the makeshift arena for a UFC fight night at the White House as part of celebrations for America’s 250th anniversary. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

headlines.title: Trump’s influence faces test in critical Texas GOP primary runoff
headlines.description: President Trump endorsed state Attorney General Ken Paxton over incumbent Senator John Cornyn in tonight’s GOP primary runoff in Texas. NBC News’ Ryan Chandler reports.

headlines.title: Doctor who survived Ebola says there needs to be ‘less lip service and more boots on the ground’
headlines.description: The deadly Ebola outbreak is spreading rapidly in the Democratic Republic of the Congo. Public health researcher and Ebola survivor Dr. Craig Spencer joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss the need for urgent international action for what could become the deadliest Ebola outbreak ever.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: 10 Texas counties to watch in the Cornyn-Paxton clash: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: Steve Kornacki previews the 10 key counties to watch as John Cornyn faces Ken Paxton in the Texas Republican Senate primary runoff election.

headlines.title: Trump administration floats requiring all federal workers to sign NDAs
headlines.description: The Trump administration is proposing a rule requiring federal workers to sign nondisclosure agreements, according to a draft notice the Office of Personnel Management posted Tuesday.“OPM believes that a governmentwide NDA form will promote consistency across Government, better protect confidential information, and better inform Federal employees of their rights and obligations regarding confidential information,” says the notice, which was posted to the Federal Register

headlines.title: Vance calls Pope Leo’s AI warnings ‘profound’
headlines.description: Vance said in an interview with NBC News he is glad the pope tackled AI. He also discussed why X remains off his phone after he deleted it for Lent.

headlines.title: Federal court blocks Alabama from using GOP-drawn congressional map
headlines.description: A three-judge panel blocked a Republican-drawn congressional map in Alabama from going into effect, writing that the district lines “intentionally discriminated based on race in violation of the Constitution.”
